nameMeanings.name: Lebold

meanings: German: variant of   Lepold  . This surname is also found in France (Alsace).

variants.name: Lepold
meanings: German: variant of   Leopold  . This surname is also found in France (Alsace). Compare   Lebold  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomasine
meanings: Hebrew: A twin; Thomasine is a female version.

en.lifeSummary: Thomasine Lebold was born in 1504, in Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 2 daughters with Johannes de Fenne. She died after 1538, in her hometown.
